title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
